channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin hits Power Law level low that historically precedes a rebound
item.description: The power law model shows BTC trading at one of its deepest discounts relative to trend, a level previously seen during the March 2020 crash and FTX collapse.

item.title: Grayscale launches lowest-fee U.S. Hyperliquid ETF as competition heats up around HYPE
item.description: The Nasdaq-listed fund charges a 0.29% sponsor fee, undercutting rival Hyperliquid ETFs from 21Shares and Bitwise.

item.title: Agentic Payments Cross the Threshold: Inside x402’s Path to Meaningful Adoption
item.description: This blog is a preview of our report, “The New Rails: How Digital Assets Are Reshaping the Foundations of Finance.”… The post Agentic Payments Cross the Threshold: Inside x402’s Path to Meaningful Adoption appeared first on Chainalysis .

item.title: George Santos Referred to DOJ, CFTC Over State of the Union Kalshi Trades: Report
item.description: The pardoned ex-congressman allegedly bet against his own State of the Union appearance while publicly hyping it.

item.title: Payment giants Stripe, Visa, Mastercard said to be among backers of soon-to-debut stablecoin platform
item.description: U.S. crypto exchange Coinbase is also said to be looking into the possibility of participating in the new stablecoin platform.

item.title: Crypto PACs go undefeated in June primaries as Fairshake scores bipartisan winning streak
item.description: Winners included Democrats Zoe Lofgren, Ted Lieu, Dave Min and Rob Menendez, as well as Republican Sen. Mike Rounds, with Democrats accounting for 10 of the 11 victories.

item.title: Bitcoin momentum gauge hints at recovery. Experts remain cautious.
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 3, 2026

item.title: UK Regulator Warns Soccer Clubs Over Unauthorized Crypto Sponsorship Deals
item.description: The FCA has warned Premier League clubs that partnerships with unlicensed crypto firms could expose fans to unregulated trading platforms.

item.title: Bitcoin's crash to $65K triggers $1.8B in crypto liquidations
item.description: Bitcoin's drop to $65,000 triggered over $1.8 billion in crypto liquidations as traders brace for a test of $60,000 as support.

item.title: Bitcoin steadies at $67,000, faces critical juncture after sliding 9.5% in seven days
item.description: The recovery does little to mask a 9.5% weekly decline as U.S. stocks hit records highs, AI tokens rally and Coinbase's Ethena deal steals the spotlight.

item.title: Apparent Zcash outage was a block explorer problem, infrastructure provider says
item.description: One expert said the issue was mainly with block explorers tracking the onchain activity.

item.title: UK's financial watchdog cracks down on Premier League crypto partnerships
item.description: The FCA said unauthorized firms could be breaching rules on financial promotions through high-profile sponsorships deals.

item.title: Bitcoin has hit 'max fear' below $67K as analysis sees BTC price rebound
item.description: Bitcoin sparked two-month lows in the Crypto Fear & Greed Index while analysis predicted a "catch-up" with record highs in stocks.

item.title: Trezor says your crypto is safe after Ledger audit exposes a hardware flaw
item.description: The flaw affects only one of the wallet's multiple security layers and would require physical access, specialized equipment and advanced expertise to exploit.

item.title: DeFi won't win over big banks until it fixes its hacking problem, executives say
item.description: Lenders are particularly interested in blockchain's back-office applications, but security failures are blocking wider adoption.

item.title: Banks' survey says people don't want to rock the boat if stablecoin yield risks lending
item.description: The American Bankers Association, which lobbies against the crypto sector over the Clarity Act's stablecoin section, unveiled its new polling.

item.title: Franklin Templeton says Wall Street fears blockchain because it threatens its profits
item.description: Jenny Johnson, Franklin Templeton's CEO, said blockchain and crypto threaten a huge number of business models that exist today in traditional finance.

item.title: It's an interesting zone for #Bitcoin, as beneath the $66K zone is where we need to see whether or not we're going to get ourselves into some interesting longs. The added part to that is the area at $61K at the 200-Week MA for support. Those are important to b - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFA5WHJtLU9SNUNscDQ2VnNad2ZRejNHMHlYM1Z5TTg4T0l3enVseFJOOF9Jcjh6cHlYUFA4a3JibmtCaGcwVkRWTmNiZ0pydVV6NmpJZUlPRmE3ZnhJX3JiYkVsYw?oc=5" target="_blank">It's an interesting zone for #Bi…

item.title: New York and EU’s finance watchdogs team up to police stablecoins
item.description: Some of the information that New York and the European Union’s watchdogs will share includes the issued stablecoins, total volume in circulation and the number of holders.

item.title: Big tech is 'terrified' of AI agents wiping out ad revenue, says Billions Network CEO
item.description: Evin McMullen’s view on AI agents disrupting Google’s and Facebook’s business model was previously shared by Cardano Founder Charles Hoskinson and Cloudflare CSO Stephanie Cohen.

item.title: Prediction market traders bet bitcoin's selloff has further to run
item.description: Markets now imply a 66% chance bitcoin falls below $55,000 and a coin-flip chance of sub-$50,000 prices before year-end.

item.title: Bitcoin falls below $66K as US and Iran launch new strikes
item.description: Bitcoin saw its largest daily drop since early February on Tuesday as the cryptocurrency shed more than $4,500 in a single day.

item.title: US Treasury issues sanctions on Iran, targets 4 crypto exchanges
item.description: The sanctions come four days after Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US had seized nearly $1 billion in crypto from Iranian crypto exchanges and wallets since late February.

item.title: Bitcoin's 'fear gauge' surges nearly 20%, its biggest jump since Feb. 5 crash
item.description: The jump signals return of fear after two months of calm market sentiment.

item.title: Bullish XRP signals are piling up. The price keeps falling.
item.description: XRP lost another major support level on heavy selling, with traders now focused on whether buyers can defend the $1.20 area after a 15-week low.

item.title: Modern robots impress, but are years away from replacing humans
item.description: AI robotics company Figure posted several videos on X throughout May showcasing its robots performing basic tasks, including cleaning a room and sorting packages.

item.title: Bullish crypto bets lose $1.6 billion as ETH, SOL, DOGE drop 9%
item.description: The single biggest unwind was a $59.67 million BTC-USDT long on HTX.

item.title: Crypto turns ‘contrarian bet’ as AI stocks draw investor attention: Bitwise
item.description: “Investors still believe in crypto, but now that it’s a contrarian bet, they favor fundamentals over vibes,” says Bitwise investment chief Matt Hougan.

item.title: Bitcoin plunges below $66,000 as global stocks, AI trades hit fresh records
item.description: BTC plunged 6.4% to a 24-hour low of $65,708 and ether broke below $1,900 in Asian trading on Wednesday, just hours after the MSCI All Country World Index set a fresh all-time high on the AI rally.

item.title: Mastercard expands onchain settlement in bet on stablecoins and always-on finance
item.description: The company plans to offer stablecoin, weekend and holiday settlement as demand grows for real-time movement of money.

item.title: Microsoft Reveals '1,000x More Reliable' Quantum Chip as Bitcoin Threat Draws Nearer
item.description: Microsoft said AI helped speed Majorana 2 development, adding to growing concerns about when quantum computers could threaten Bitcoin's cryptography.

item.title: Tether-Backed Adecoagro to Launch Sugarcane-Powered Bitcoin Mining in Brazil Adecoagro, a South American agricultural company in which Tether is a major shareholder, is preparing to launch Bitcoin mining in Brazil using clean energy generated from bu - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9ZbHJmZnQtQnZBSHZXMW01ckhZYTlxaEZVazZOUndGYXRvWHY1S2ZCemVlVTc0a0NKNTNCOWRQTHJqa3BacWRTMkoxRDBUcVMxSGdEUFNiX2t1ZnE1MGFqb3Jjcw?oc=5" target="_blank">Tether-Backed Adecoagro to Launc…

item.title: Cardano’s TapTools to wind down after 5 execs exit
item.description: Despite the planned wind-down, TapTools says it is open to being acquired or taking on external resources to continue maintaining the platform.

item.title: Bitcoin's slide to $66,000 is accelerating a shift into digital dollars
item.description: The crypto market is seeing a capital flight into dollar-linked stablecoins even as stocks and the Dollar Index remain calm.

item.title: 📊 The descent of crypto prices, particularly Bitcoin’s -13% drop in the past week, can be attributed primarily to the dumping by key stakeholders: 🐳🦈 Bitcoin whales and sharks (holding 10-10K $BTC) have dumped -24,602 coins (-18%) in the past week. 🐟🦐 Bit - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFAtZjNGRk9xY2lDNG16N1MtVXhFdy1FLXZJa2NmQUZwb2ZzcVp4NFVXZFJib25qdmpwRkdvZDFDY0c4ZXVVcE0yeVgwWHdFdV9MaWs3QWVxMVQyNzg4S1poZUdEa1Q?oc=5" target="_blank">📊 The descent of crypto prices…

item.title: Cardsmiths' New America250 Trading Cards Have Real Bitcoin, Dogecoin Up for Grabs
item.description: Cardsmiths’ latest Currency trading card series tackles American history—and some packs include codes for real Bitcoin, Ethereum, and more.

item.title: OFAC Sanctions Nobitex and Major Iranian Cryptocurrency Exchanges in Sweeping Evasion Crackdown
item.description: Summary The Department of the Treasury’s Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) designated four major Iranian cryptocurrency exchanges: Nobitex, Bitpin,… The post OFAC Sanctions Nobitex and Major Iranian Cryptocurrency Exchanges in Sweepi…

item.title: UK Lords warn BoE could regulate pound stablecoins into irrelevance
item.description: A UK House of Lords committee warned that strict stablecoin rules could make pound sterling tokens commercially unworkable despite supporting regulation.

item.title: JUST IN: Peter Schiff says Bitcoin will crash below $20,000. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE81QXdlSEVya2xNMk9OVHlWR0VSb0JWNmRTSlJuY2tNTWpheVdNdkpvN2J2WmJEZWRuaWdleUFQRnNfODhieWJEMkVYd2lxeTRJNjJEeUE5OUxyNFh0di1NUi1R?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Peter Schiff says Bitcoin…

item.title: US Treasury Sanctions Iranian Crypto Exchanges Including Nobitex for Terrorist Financing
item.description: The Treasury's Office of Foreign Assets Control accused the platforms of enabling illicit finance activities across Iran's crypto ecosystem.

item.title: US lawmakers push back on Labor Department plans to include crypto in 401(k)s
item.description: The three members of Congress said the volatility of digital assets and “lack of regulation and safeguards” could put Americans’ retirement savings at risk.

item.title: As Bitcoin Sinks, It's Time for Ethereum to Outperform: Standard Chartered
item.description: Bitcoin is falling following Strategy's first BTC sale since 2022—and one analyst sees that as a good thing for Ethereum.

item.title: 1/ Today, we’re sending a letter to Senate Majority Leader Thune and Senate Democratic Leader Schumer signed by 160 former national security, intelligence, and law enforcement professionals in support of the Clarity Act. theblockchainassociation.org/posts/ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE15X1h1M0ViSzY1bWdwZlNOSUVMS3Q5RU0zNlQ3NXg2enJVRUtLOS1IRjQwMk5oNzYzMFo4Tl9lUy1mTWRCdHJhRU85bEh0NnViWWZKUlBIcUdqX1I2b280ekR0SHlwZw?oc=5" target="_blank">1/ Today, we’re sending a le…

item.title: SEC makes digital assets strategic priority through 2030
item.description: The regulator’s five-year roadmap calls for clearer crypto rules, support for tokenization and a framework for staking and onchain markets.

item.title: Crypto correction vaporized $176B in investor funds: Are bears back in control?
item.description: Bitcoin and altcoin prices crumbled as BTC lost the $70,000 level. Will investors’ pivot to AI stocks continue to weigh on crypto markets?

item.title: Microsoft Says Latest AI Models Beat Claude, Google's Nano Banana
item.description: Microsoft unveiled seven in-house AI models and claimed its flagship reasoning and image systems outperform rivals from Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google.

item.title: Crypto PACs pour $3M into Maryland races as California voters head to polls
item.description: An affiliate of a political action committee backed by crypto companies ramped up spending on ads in California ahead of Tuesday’s primaries, but still has millions of dollars at stake in Maryland later this month.

item.title: Strategy Shares Fall for Second Straight Day After $56 Billion Bitcoin Giant Sells BTC
item.description: Shares in the leading Bitcoin treasury firm Strategy (MSTR) are now more than 70% off their 52-week high after the company sold BTC.

item.title: Microsoft Turns OpenClaw Into an Enterprise AI Agent With Scout
item.description: Tech people will say everyone's already using OpenClaw. They're right. But Microsoft is the one with 1.4 billion Windows users ready to adopt it.

item.title: Coinbase invests in ProShares ETF tailored for stablecoin reserve assets
item.description: The exchange has invested an undisclosed amount in ProShares’ Treasury-focused ETF built for the post-GENIUS era as lawmakers debate whether stablecoin issuers can offer yield-bearing products.

item.title: Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren Urge Labor Department to Drop Bitcoin, Crypto 401K Plan
item.description: The senators said a plan allowing fiduciaries to offer exposure to riskier assets like crypto and private equity would hurt retirees and personally benefit President Trump.

item.title: Bitcoin’s $224K ‘fair value’ may emerge if sovereign debt fears deepen: Bitwise
item.description: A sovereign default-risk model estimates Bitcoin’s fair value at $224,000, as rising debt risks and bond-market stress could strengthen the asset’s long-term investment case.

item.title: Where Does Bitcoin Go From Here? This Is What the Charts Say
item.description: Bitcoin just had its worst day since April. The death cross is in effect, and prediction markets are bearish.

item.title: This is the gameplan for $NEAR, if Bitcoin doesn't collapse further down the line. It did break upwards and it managed to hold there, despite the overall weakness on Bitcoin. It made a higher high, and is currently flipping this area for support, which means it's ti - x.com

item.title: New York’s Crypto Watchdog Teams With EU to Police Stablecoins
item.description: The New York Department of Financial Services and European Banking Authority said they'll work together to oversee stablecoins.

item.title: As Strategy Sells Bitcoin, Strive Doubles Down With $4.2 Billion Offering
item.description: Benchmark-StoneX analysts grew bullish towards Strive after the Bitcoin-buying asset manager padded cash reserves while growing its stockpile.

item.title: President Trump Signs AI Executive Order After Delaying It Over China Concerns
item.description: Trump's executive order creates a voluntary framework for reviewing advanced AI models, expands AI-powered cybersecurity efforts, and more.

item.title: 12 REASONS WHY IT'S THE COLDEST CRYPTO WINTER EVER Back in February I wrote a list of 10 reasons why this the worst crypto winter ever. Well everything I cited then still holds, but now I have 2 more ways it's gotten worse: From the newsletter bloom - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin gets new $50K target after BTC price crashes 6% in a day
item.description: Bitcoin price bets saw $50,000 returning after 6% daily BTC price losses liquidated $1.25 billion of crypto positions.

item.title: CFTC chair claims Gemini case was politically motivated, seeks to reverse settlement
item.description: The CFTC chair seeks to roll back an enforcement action on the company founded by Cameron and Tyler Winklevoss, donors to Donald Trump’s 2024 campaign and attendees at White House events.
